top_signals.title: Beijing is summoning executives again, but here's why that's causing less worry than in 2021
top_signals.summary: Beijing is summoning tech executives for meetings as it did in 2021, but now it has less room to wield a heavy hand due to deflation and rivalry with the U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
